title: cyanus achtarovii
intro: Cyanus achtarovii, also known as Cornflower, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. The medicinal properties of Cornflower include its ability to reduce inflammation, calm digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations. The health benefits of using Cornflower include alleviating symptoms of menstrual cramps, insomnia, and anxiety, as well as its potential to improve vision and reduce blood pressure. Cornflower can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil to reap its medicinal benefits.
